CustomField.description: Per-signal gate for Stub D (rolling 7-day trend of SyncItem__c.StatusPk__c=Failed rows that did NOT auto-recover, compared against prior 7 days). Defaults to null — stub returns empty list until 14-21 days of reconciler data exist to baseline what normal failure rate looks like.
CustomField.label: Enable Watcher Sync Trend Signal (Stub)
